title: potentilla alpestris var. pyrenaica
intro: Potentilla alpestris var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Potentilla alpestris var. pyrenaica can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, added to food, or used topically in creams and ointments.
